problem id: fbbe43a3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01110111 -> 11100000
  00000110 -> 00001100
  10011000 -> 00100011
  00110010 -> 01100010
  00001101 -> 00011011
  10110011 -> 01110000
  11111010 -> 11101011
  10111011 -> 01100001

query: 00001010
predicted answer: 00010101
